title: tetradenia bainesii
intro: Tetradenia bainesii, also known as African geranium or geranium thunbergii, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Tetradenia bainesii is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
